Description: Build timeline-first lifecycle workspace with deterministic state and role-safe actions.

Implement reminder scheduling and lifecycle nudges with delivery tracking.
Implement goal-to-team-to-business lineage model and contribution visibility.

Implement SLOs telemetry alerts runbooks and rollback triggers before broad rollout.
